---
pagetitle: "Infrastructură Digitală — chen.ist"
title-block-style: none
description: "Infrastructură open-source, Linux, BSD și Apple Business de calitate pentru IMM-uri. NixOS, OpenBSD, FreeBSD, Nextcloud și implementare Apple fără configurare manuală."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .quarto-title-block, #title-block-header { display: none !important; }
        #quarto-content > * { margin-top: 0 !important; padding-top: 0 !important; }
        main.content { padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important; max-width: 100% !important; }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:65vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">chen.ist</div>
    <h1>Infrastructură<br>Digitală</h1>
    <p>Platforme open-source, UNIX și Apple. Implementate și gestionate pentru afacerea dvs.</p>
    <a href="#pillars" class="ev-btn">Explorați</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">40–70%</div><div class="m-nl">Economii IT</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">100%</div><div class="m-nl">Open-source</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">UE</div><div class="m-nl">Suveranitatea datelor</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">24/7</div><div class="m-nl">Monitorizare</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- THREE PILLARS -->
<div class="m-s" id="pillars" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Trei piloni. Un singur partener.</h2>
    <p class="sub">Tot ce are nevoie afacerea dvs. pentru a funcționa, securizat și întreținut de noi.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="#opensource" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Open Source"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Pilonul 1</div><h3>Stack Open-Source</h3><p>Productivitate, comunicare, identitate și monitorizare — fără taxe de licență.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="#unix" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="UNIX"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Pilonul 2</div><h3>Sisteme UNIX</h3><p>Servere Linux și BSD, firewall-uri, stocare și infrastructură declarativă.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="#apple" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Apple"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Pilonul 3</div><h3>Infrastructură Apple</h3><p>Apple Business MDM, implementare zero-touch, email și gestionare de brand.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- OPEN SOURCE -->
<div class="m-bg" id="opensource" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Dezvoltare open-source"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Înlocuiți licențele.<br>Păstrați funcționalitatea.</h2>
        <p>Nextcloud pentru fișiere. Collabora pentru documente. Matrix pentru chat. Keycloak pentru SSO. Prometheus pentru monitorizare. Toate open-source, toate self-hosted, toate ale dvs.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/ro/booking/" class="m-lk">Planificați-vă stack-ul</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- UNIX -->
<div class="m-s" id="unix" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Infrastructură servere UNIX"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Servere care se<br>administrează singure.</h2>
        <p>NixOS pentru implementări declarative și reproductibile. OpenBSD pentru firewall-uri. FreeBSD pentru stocare ZFS. Debian pentru restul. Securizate implicit.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/ro/booking/" class="m-lk">Proiectați-vă infrastructura</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- APPLE -->
<div class="m-bg" id="apple" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Implementare Apple Business"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Apple Business.<br>Gratuit. Integrat. Pregătit.</h2>
        <p>Noua platformă unificată se lansează pe 14 aprilie 2026. MDM gratuit, Blueprints pentru configurare zero-touch, email de afaceri pe domeniul dvs. și gestionare de brand pe Maps, Wallet și Mail.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/ro/booking/" class="m-lk">Configurați Apple Business</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PACKAGES -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Alegeți punctul de start</h2>
    <p class="sub">Toate pachetele includ implementare, securizare, monitorizare și suport.</p>
    <div class="row g-4 justify-content-center">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div style="border:1.5px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.1); border-radius:20px; padding:2.5rem 2rem; height:100%; display:flex; flex-direction:column; transition:border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='rgba(129,189,74,0.3)';this.style.transform='translateY(-4px)';" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='rgba(129,189,74,0.1)';this.style.transform='none';">
          <div style="width:48px;height:48px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(129,189,74,0.08);border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:1.25rem;">
            <i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff" style="font-size:1.25rem;color:#81BD4A;"></i>
          </div>
          <h3 style="font-size:1.35rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.15rem;">Starter</h3>
          <div style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#86868b;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">1–10 angajați</div>
          <div style="flex-grow:1;">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Configurare Apple Business</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>1 server Linux</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Nextcloud + email</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Firewall de bază</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Backup-uri automate</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Monitorizare disponibilitate</span></div>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-top:1.75rem;text-align:center;">
            <a href="/ro/booking/" class="m-bo" style="width:100%;display:block;text-align:center;">Solicitați o ofertă</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div style="border:2px solid #81BD4A; border-radius:20px; padding:2.5rem 2rem; height:100%; display:flex; flex-direction:column; position:relative; transition:transform 0.2s; box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(129,189,74,0.1);" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-4px)';" onmouseout="this.style.transform='none';">
          <div style="position:absolute;top:-14px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#81BD4A;color:#fff;font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;padding:0.3rem 1rem;border-radius:980px;">Cel mai popular</div>
          <div style="width:48px;height:48px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(129,189,74,0.12);border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:1.25rem;">
            <i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow" style="font-size:1.25rem;color:#81BD4A;"></i>
          </div>
          <h3 style="font-size:1.35rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.15rem;">Growth</h3>
          <div style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#86868b;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">11–50 angajați</div>
          <div style="flex-grow:1;">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Tot din Starter</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Apple MDM complet</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Firewall OpenBSD + VPN</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Keycloak SSO</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Mesagerie Matrix</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Documente Collabora</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Prometheus + Grafana</span></div>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-top:1.75rem;text-align:center;">
            <a href="/ro/booking/" class="m-b" style="width:100%;display:block;text-align:center;color:#fff !important;">Programați o consultanță</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div style="border:1.5px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.1); border-radius:20px; padding:2.5rem 2rem; height:100%; display:flex; flex-direction:column; transition:border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='rgba(129,189,74,0.3)';this.style.transform='translateY(-4px)';" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='rgba(129,189,74,0.1)';this.style.transform='none';">
          <div style="width:48px;height:48px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(129,189,74,0.08);border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:1.25rem;">
            <i class="bi bi-building" style="font-size:1.25rem;color:#81BD4A;"></i>
          </div>
          <h3 style="font-size:1.35rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.15rem;">Enterprise</h3>
          <div style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#86868b;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">50+ angajați</div>
          <div style="flex-grow:1;">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Tot din Growth</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Flotă multi-server NixOS</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Stocare FreeBSD ZFS</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>VPN mesh multi-sediu</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Referințe NIS2 + GDPR</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.4rem 0;font-size:0.88rem;"><i class="bi bi-check2" style="color:#81BD4A;margin-top:0.15rem;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Răspuns la incidente 24/7</span></div>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-top:1.75rem;text-align:center;">
            <a href="/ro/booking/" class="m-bo" style="width:100%;display:block;text-align:center;">Contactați-ne</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RELATED -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Servicii conexe</h2>
    <p class="sub">Infrastructura funcționează cel mai bine cu strategia potrivită de securitate și cloud.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/ro/security/" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Securitate"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Securitate</h3><p>SOC 24/7, detectare amenințări și conformitate NIS2.</p></div></div></a></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/ro/services/cloud/" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Cloud"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Servicii Cloud</h3><p>Migrare cloud UE și gestionare multi-cloud.</p></div></div></a></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/ro/compare.html" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Comparație"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>De ce Open Source</h3><p>Vedeți cum se compară stack-urile open-source cu alternativele proprietare.</p></div></div></a></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Infrastructura dvs.,<br>construită corect</h2>
    <p>30 de minute. Fără pitch. Doar o evaluare onestă a ceea ce putem construi pentru dvs.</p>
    <a href="/ro/booking/" class="m-b" style="color:#fff !important;">Programați auditul gratuit</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Gratuit &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Fără dependență &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Propunere în 48h
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
